        public static global::System.Boolean IsNormal(ComplexQuantity value) => __IsNormal<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsOddInteger(ComplexQuantity value) => __IsOddInteger<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsPositive(ComplexQuantity value) => __IsPositive<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsPositiveInfinity(ComplexQuantity value) => __IsPositiveInfinity<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsRealNumber(ComplexQuantity value) => __IsRealNumber<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsSubnormal(ComplexQuantity value) => __IsSubnormal<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static global::System.Boolean IsZero(ComplexQuantity value) => __IsZero<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value);
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity Abs(ComplexQuantity value) => From(__Abs<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(value.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity MaxMagnitude(ComplexQuantity x, ComplexQuantity y) => From(__MaxMagnitude<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity MaxMagnitudeNumber(ComplexQuantity x, ComplexQuantity y) => From(__MaxMagnitudeNumber<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity MinMagnitude(ComplexQuantity x, ComplexQuantity y) => From(__MinMagnitude<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity MinMagnitudeNumber(ComplexQuantity x, ComplexQuantity y) => From(__MinMagnitudeNumber<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(x.Value, y.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity CreateChecked<TOther>(TOther value)
            where TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<TOther> => From(__CreateChecked<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity CreateSaturating<TOther>(TOther value)
            where TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<TOther> => From(__CreateSaturating<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity CreateTruncating<TOther>(TOther value)
            where TOther : global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<TOther> => From(__CreateTruncating<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value));
#nullable disable
        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<ComplexQuantity>.TryConvertFromChecked<TOther>(TOther value, out ComplexQuantity result)
        {
            result = default;
            if (!__TryConvertFromChecked<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value, out global::System.Numerics.Complex primitiveResult))
                return false;
            result = From(primitiveResult);
            return true;
        }

        {
            result = default;
            if (!__TryConvertFromSaturating<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value, out global::System.Numerics.Complex primitiveResult))
                return false;
            result = From(primitiveResult);
            return true;
        }

        {
            result = default;
            if (!__TryConvertFromTruncating<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value, out global::System.Numerics.Complex primitiveResult))
                return false;
            result = From(primitiveResult);
            return true;
        }

        static global::System.Boolean global::System.Numerics.INumberBase<ComplexQuantity>.TryConvertToChecked<TOther>(ComplexQuantity value, out TOther result)
        {
            result = default;
            return __TryConvertToChecked<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value.Value, out result);
        }

        {
            result = default;
            return __TryConvertToSaturating<global::System.Numerics.Complex, TOther>(value.Value, out result);
        }

        {
            result = default;

        }

#nullable restore
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator +(ComplexQuantity left, ComplexQuantity right) => From((global::System.Numerics.Complex)(left.Value + right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator -(ComplexQuantity left, ComplexQuantity right) => From((global::System.Numerics.Complex)(left.Value - right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator *(ComplexQuantity left, ComplexQuantity right) => From((global::System.Numerics.Complex)(left.Value * right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator /(ComplexQuantity left, ComplexQuantity right) => From((global::System.Numerics.Complex)(left.Value / right.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator -(ComplexQuantity value) => From((global::System.Numerics.Complex)(-value.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator +(ComplexQuantity value) => From((global::System.Numerics.Complex)(+value.Value));
        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator ++(ComplexQuantity value)
        {
            var v = value.Value;
            return From(++v);
        }

        /// <inheritdoc/>
        public static ComplexQuantity operator --(ComplexQuantity value)
        {
            var v = value.Value;
            return From(--v);
        }

        public readonly override global::System.Int32 GetHashCode()
        {
            return global::System.Collections.Generic.EqualityComparer<global::System.Numerics.Complex>.Default.GetHashCode(Value);
        }

        /// <inheritdoc cref = "global::System.Numerics.Complex.ToString()"/>
        public override global::System.String ToString() => IsInitialized() ? Value.ToString() ?? "" : "[UNINITIALIZED]";
        /// <inheritdoc cref = "global::System.Numerics.Complex.ToString(System.IFormatProvider? )"/>
        public global::System.String ToString(global::System.IFormatProvider provider) => IsInitialized() ? Value.ToString(provider) ?? "" : "[UNINITIALIZED]";
        /// <inheritdoc cref = "global::System.Numerics.Complex.ToString(string? )"/>
        public global::System.String ToString([System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.StringSyntaxAttribute("NumericFormat")] string format) => IsInitialized() ? Value.ToString(format) ?? "" : "[UNINITIALIZED]";
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        private readonly void EnsureInitialized()
        {
            if (!IsInitialized())
            {
#if DEBUG
               ThrowHelper.ThrowWhenNotInitialized(_stackTrace);
#else
                ThrowHelper.ThrowWhenNotInitialized();
#endif
            }
        }

#nullable disable
        /// <summary>
        /// Converts a ComplexQuantity to or from JSON.
        /// </summary>
        public partial class ComplexQuantitySystemTextJsonConverter : global::System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonConverter<ComplexQuantity>
        {
            public override ComplexQuantity Read(ref global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader reader, global::System.Type typeToConvert, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                var primitive = global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(ref reader, options);
                return DeserializeJson(primitive);
            }

            public override void Write(global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, ComplexQuantity value, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(writer, value.Value, options);
            }

#if NET6_0_OR_GREATER
            public override ComplexQuantity ReadAsPropertyName(ref global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader reader, global::System.Type typeToConvert, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                var primitive = global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<global::System.Numerics.Complex>(ref reader, options);
                return DeserializeJson(primitive);
            }

            public override void WriteAsPropertyName(global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, ComplexQuantity value, global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
            {
                writer.WritePropertyName(global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(value.Value));
            }
#endif
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
            [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            private static void ThrowJsonExceptionWhenValidationFails(global::Vogen.Validation validation)
            {
                var e = ThrowHelper.CreateValidationException(validation);
                throw new global::System.Text.Json.JsonException(null, e);
            }

            private static ComplexQuantity DeserializeJson(global::System.Numerics.Complex value)
            {
                return new ComplexQuantity(value);
            }
        }

#nullable restore
#nullable disable
        class ComplexQuantityTypeConverter : global::System.ComponentModel.TypeConverter
        {
            public override global::System.Boolean CanConvertFrom(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Type sourceType)
            {
                return sourceType == typeof(global::System.Numerics.Complex);
            }

            public override global::System.Object ConvertFrom(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture, global::System.Object value)
            {
                global::System.Numerics.Complex ut = (global::System.Numerics.Complex)value;
                return ComplexQuantity.__Deserialize(ut);
            }

            public override bool CanConvertTo(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Type sourceType)
            {
                return sourceType == typeof(global::System.Numerics.Complex);
            }

            public override object ConvertTo(global::System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, global::System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture, global::System.Object value, global::System.Type destinationType)
            {
                if (value is ComplexQuantity idValue)
                {
                    return idValue.Value;
                }

                return base.ConvertTo(context, culture, value, destinationType);
            }
        }

#nullable restore
#nullable disable
        internal sealed class ComplexQuantityDebugView
        {
            private readonly ComplexQuantity _t;
            ComplexQuantityDebugView(ComplexQuantity t)
            {
                _t = t;
            }

            public global::System.Boolean IsInitialized => _t.IsInitialized();
            public global::System.String UnderlyingType => "System.Numerics.Complex";
            public global::System.String Value => _t.IsInitialized() ? _t._value.ToString() : "[not initialized]";
#if DEBUG
        public global::System.String CreatedWith => _t._stackTrace.ToString() ?? "the From method";
#endif
            public global::System.String Conversions => @"Default";
        }

#nullable restore
        static class ThrowHelper
        {
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowInvalidOperationException(string message) => throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException(message);
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowArgumentException(string message, string arg) => throw new global::System.ArgumentException(message, arg);
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenCreatedWithNull() => throw CreateCannotBeNullException();
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenNotInitialized() => throw CreateValidationException("Use of uninitialized Value Object.");
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenNotInitialized(global::System.Diagnostics.StackTrace stackTrace) => throw CreateValidationException("Use of uninitialized Value Object at: " + stackTrace ?? "");
#if NETCOREAPP3_0_OR_GREATER
    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute]
#endif
            internal static void ThrowWhenValidationFails(global::Vogen.Validation validation)
            {
                throw CreateValidationException(validation);
            }

            internal static global::System.Exception CreateValidationException(string message) => new global::Vogen.ValueObjectValidationException(message);
            internal static global::System.Exception CreateCannotBeNullException() => new global::Vogen.ValueObjectValidationException("Cannot create a value object with null.");
            internal static global::System.Exception CreateValidationException(global::Vogen.Validation validation)
            {
                var ex = CreateValidationException(validation.ErrorMessage);
                if (validation.Data != null)
                {
                    foreach (var kvp in validation.Data)
                    {
                        ex.Data[kvp.Key] = kvp.Value;
                    }
                }

                return ex;
            }
        }
    }
}
]
